entry.title: Re: Aggregation of rate elements with rate subelements Subscription billing
entry.content: This may be better handled by other LoB, Sales rather than Finance, since there are pricing elements involved.

entry.title: What is the time zone response of SAP when communicating to BTP apps? Is it UTC?
entry.content: I would like to know if what is the time zone response of SAP S4HC Public when communicating or throwing date/time data to BTP apps. Is it in UTC? We are trying to resolve an issue with date/time in the printouts of maintenance order using a custom app in BTP wherein the printout output display for date/time is in UTC while the user time zone is set in the S4 from the user in UTC+10. Please confirm if the time zone in the backend of S4 is using UTC and it is the data that is being transferred to BTP? Meaning the user time zone is being disregard?

entry.title: T-CODE for mass upload of linking documents to Material Master
entry.content:
I used CV01N to upload, link drawing into a Material Master. When I need to upload multiple documents for various materials it takes a long time. Is there a T-code that can be use for document mass upload? 

Thank you,

Ellen

entry.title: Re: Details understanding into Resource Module SAP Busine...
entry.content:
Helllo,

 

Refer to the followings:

  1. E-learning: Production and MRP - Select Learning Journey for Consultant in your language or in English > SAP Business One - Production and MRP
  2. How to Work with Resources and Production in SAP Business One 10.0
  3. 2727909 - FAQs Related to Production Costing and Production Process

Regards
EunSeok

entry.title: product master categorization - Classification
entry.content: Hello Experts, I work on a requirement to be able to categorize products according to a customer need It is required to be able to classify products by Brands, Families, Sub Families, Lines and Sub lines I first explore the category levels of S/4 Hana Cloud Public before thinking about user fields How could this parameterization be carried out, what classification levels are manageable in the ERP?

entry.title: Re: Problems with Patch in C# Console App - Don't Work -...
entry.content: Hi Mike, does it mean you succeeded with other methods like GET and POST, and only not successful with PATCH?

entry.title: Re: Tansfer balance between one customer to another customer via API
entry.content: Hello, Are you using S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Re: Header level Aggregated value ZPR1, needs to automatic update in the Header Condition Type ZPMO.
entry.content: Added Sales tag, please remove other tags.

entry.title: Re: Problems with Patch in C# Console App - Don't Work -...
entry.content: It would be also worth trying to specify TLS version e.g. 1.2 if you use B1 10.0, and try /b1s/v2 to be compatiable with OData V4 because otherwise I don't see an issue.

entry.title: Re: Name 3 (LFA1-NAME3) is a required entry field, Messag...
entry.content:
Unless there is a specific reason why you are using the GUI option you should use the Manage Business Partner Master Data app to create your suppliers. There may be fields only accessible via the GUI app but the creation will be better initiated through the new app. 

It looks weird since it seems that you are selecting person as the BP to be created, is this the intention? Another problem may be that, from your screenshot, you are not creating the general data first for the BP where you can find all the fields for the name, i.e. name3. Make sure you are creating the general section first. 

Try the new app and see if you get the same error message.

entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA CDS Data Source for Product Change
entry.content:
Hi Angela,

Thank you for your recommendation. Is there any other way to get data in material/product change like API?

Thank you,

Jen

entry.title: Re: Problems with Patch in C# Console App - Don't Work -...
entry.content: hi @EunSeok_Bang , only with PATCH

entry.title: Re: What happens with deleted cost accounts in S4HANA after migration?
entry.content:
Is this a conversion to S/4HANA Cloud PUBLIC Edition or is this PRIVATE Edition? From your comments and tools it looks like you are upgrading from ECC to an S/4HANA system but not the Public Cloud. Could you please confirm? 

Apologies, I have my answer, you mentioned it in the header.

entry.title: How to understand revenue values?
entry.content:
We have a Customer Project that we are not understanding how the values are being calculated. How can we understand that?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to understand revenue values?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 


In order to understand recognition methods and how the revenue was calculated, you can check which Revenue Recognition Key is being used for your project in Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Projects and then refer to the corresponding posting logic in below documentation:

Revenue Recognition Methods for Customer Projects


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to read AIF logs from ABAP code(RAP) in S4 HANA p...
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @munipkumar.

To read error log messages programmatically from the message dashboard (AIF) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition you may want to get familiar with this API: Overview | Message Processing Logs | SAP Business Accelerator Hub.  

The SOAP API that operates like a response to the Create Asset API you mentioned is this creation confirmation API: Overview | Fixed Asset - Create Main Asset (Asynchronous) Confirmation | SAP Business Accelerator Hub.  

You can find a list of all asynchronous APIs on Asset Accounting here: APIs for Asset Accounting | SAP Help Portal.

If this solved your request, please mark this response accordingly. Thank you.

entry.title: How can I clear the WIP balance in TECO production order?
entry.content:
Hello Community!

How do we handle scrap processing for production orders and WIP (Work in Progress) balance for TECO status items?

We are using Event-Based Production Cost Posting (3F0).

Current status of production orders

 

- Cancelled after material costs were added

- Partial processing costs added: At standard cost

- Production order TECO status

Currently Display line Items in General ledger App. there is a remaining WIP balance.

 

How can I clear the WIP balance?

Please help me.

Huny.

entry.title: Re: if end if inside the case end -case
entry.content:
Thank you for your questions, @vieet.

Sandra has answered them in the comments. 

If that solves your request please mark accordingly and please give Sandra Kudos. Thank you.

entry.title: Solution Manager SP upgrade
entry.content:
When we upgrade the Solution Manager support pack, do we need to re-run every step in "Mandatory Configuration? I wasn't able to find documentation on this, hopefully you can help. Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager SP upgrade
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

After upgrading the Solution Manager support package, please make sure that the following:

  1. Ensure that both Solution Manager System and Managed Systems are configured correctly in LMDB.
  2. Check mandatory configuration in solman_setup and make sure all steps are completed with green lights. (including re-execution steps marked in yellow lights & new steps coming with the SP upgrade)
    1. - System preparation
    2. - Infrastructure Preparation
    3. - Basic Configuration
  3. Check all activities in Managed Systems Configuration and make sure all steps are completed successfully with green lights.

 

Best regards,

Leo

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to put fiori app check just like SY-TCODE check i...
entry.content:
Thank you for your request, @gauravdaswani. 

In S/4HANA Cloud, the BAdI's context shows which data you have available to work with as parameters within the BAdI. Other parameters are not available for you to access in your BAdI implementation. 

If this response answers your question, please mark it accordingly.

entry.title: Re: how to build a RAP application to upload program in S...
entry.content: Link in point 1 is invalid.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Paris : Qui êtes-vous ?
entry.content:
Bonjour je suis une Consultante Fonctionnelle Junior SAP

Professionnelle motivée avec une solide expérience en développement web et formation.

Formée en SAP WM, PP, et MM, je cherche à mettre à profit mes compétences dans des missions stimulantes en environnement dynamique.

Forte de mon sens du détail et de ma volonté d'apprendre, je suis prête à contribuer activement à des projets SAP au sein d'équipes multidisciplinaires.

Disponibilité et Mobilité
Missions freelance ou CDD.
Mobile en Île-de-France et Haute-Normandie, déplacements ponctuels possibles sur toute la France. Mon CV ici https://www.anouchka-minkoue-obame.fr/

entry.title: Re: CDS Entity View as data source in SAP Data Services Designer
entry.content: So i wrapped the classic view entity by using a classic cds view. This time the SAP Data Service Designer was able to find it but it returned this error: Error: Cannot import the metadata table <name=ZxxxxxxxMNVW>

entry.title: Can ObjectStore API be consumed with mtls(certificate way)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are in process of enabling mtls for all our APIs. With respect to that we are consuming ObjectStore APIs .

Currently we pass the secret key provided while creation of objectstore instance and we are able to access the APIs. But in future we would like to pass certficate and then consume the objectstore APIS. Kindly let us know how can we configure Objectstore instance to  provide required certificate. In short is mtls supported by ObjectStore?

entry.title: Re: Understanding Consolidation of Investment (COI) in SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting – par
entry.content:
hi Nilesh Sinha，

With T code CXE0, you can found S21 task group in sscui Define Task Group.

This is standard group and if you cannot found it, please raise an incident in Component FIN-CS-CNT

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: Failed to loa...
entry.content: Hello Gregor, I have this issue on mi CAP service on BTP, this is bounded with conectivity and destination service. My approuter instance get data from external service odata but my service instance not and it's returned this error.

entry.title: Re: How to set dynamic Key Value parameter in Call B1 Object atom
entry.content: Hi, would you try #/vpf:Msg/vpf:Body/vpf:Payload[./@id='atom2']/BusinessPartners/row/CardCode?

entry.title: Re: How to update Grant Master Data using Local API in SA...
entry.content:
Hi  @Enda 

Yes, I tried but was NOT successful.

SAP is not permitted to update the status of the Grant Master data via standard API.

Using the Postman tool to update Grant’s status via standard API will display the Error PSM_S4C_GM_MD/163.

 

After a long time of investigating and debugging, I found some coding that prevented Grant's status from being updated.

The code said that Modification of Grant Life Cycle status is allowed only based on the configuration entries available for Life cycle statuses.

 Do you have any other solution for updating Grant's status?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: HCI: Using Eclipse WSDL Editor for SOAP-based integration
entry.content:
For generating async interfaces, just deleting the response structure in Eclipse leads to errors when generating the ABAP proxy.

For this the WSDL needs to be manually updated to remove the output.

 

<wsdl:output>

<soap:body use="literal"/>

</wsdl:output>

entry.title: Re: Could not get the ApiHub resource data
entry.content:
It maybe that your SAP Universal ID is getting in the way.  I did reset my Universal ID at some stage when I was mucking around with something else months ago and I now have a different password for the accounts.sap.com vs the account.sap.com !!   Crazy...anyway.

If you can check your credentials via this link   https://accounts.sap.com/ui/protected/profilemanagement

then those are the credentials to use to connect from SAP Business Application Studio's Service Center to the API Business Hub.  At least that worked for me.

regards

Peter.

entry.title: Re: WBS plan line item text
entry.content: Do you get the solution? could you please share

entry.title: Re: MD04 Collective Access - Stock Days' Supply
entry.content:
Hello

I assume you did not read the F1 help of the 'To' and 'From' Stock Supply Days' fields. 

The F1 help provides the following information: "Selects the lists of those materials in respect of which the current plant stock without receipts suffice until at least the specified date"

It means that system will not select materials with planning elements within this date, but it will select materials for which the plant stock without receipts can cover all requirements within the date interval.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: 供應商發票Create API 是否能輸入調節科目?
entry.content:
Supplier Invoice - Create (A2X, Inbound, Synchronous)

如題，請問供應商發票Create API 是否能輸入調節科目?

據了解，Journal Entry API有支援輸入調節科目欄位 AltvRecnclnAccts，經測試也確實能用:

但目前從供應商發票api文件中，似乎沒看到有調節科目欄位可帶入。

供應商發票Create API，除了會建立供應商發票清單外，也會自動建立日記帳分錄，目的是希望此對應的日記帳分錄貸方科目可以替換成帶入的調節科目，而非供應商主檔中綁定的調節科目。

請問是否有什麼方法可以使用API建立供應商發票時，帶上調節科目? 謝謝!

entry.title: Re: Integrating Successfactors Recruiting with customer c...
entry.content: Hi phongth,

entry.title: Re: Integrating Successfactors Recruiting with customer c...
entry.content: Hi phongth, Worthwhile to find out the reasons why they insist on using their own career site instead of the RMK career site which is already part of the SF Recruiting solution that they have bought. Also worthwhile to evaluate if the reasons are good enough to justify the integration efforts required for something like this which is usually not part of the implementation scope.

entry.title: Реферальный код Bybit: 62545 — Новое обновление бонуса Bybit
entry.content:
Криптовалютная биржаBybit
Реферальный код Bybit"62545"
Скидка на торговые комиссииДо 10% на первый месяц
Приветственный бонусДо 30,000 USDT
Ставка скидки и бонусБонус $25 USDT и до 30,000 USDT

С 14/08/2024 используйте реферальный код Bybit "62545" для получения 10% скидки на торговые комиссии и до 30,000 USDT в качестве приветственного бонуса. Для получения полного бонуса выполняйте задачи, такие как торговля фьючерсами, пополнение счета и завершение KYC (проверка личности)

 

С 14/08/2024 примените реферальный код Bybit "62545", чтобы получить 10% скидку на все торговые комиссии и до 30,000 USDT в виде бонусов при регистрации. Для получения полного бонуса выполняйте задачи, включая торговлю криптовалютами, пополнение счета и завершение KYC.

 

Начинайте с 14/08/2024 использовать реферальный код Bybit "62545", чтобы получить 10% скидку на торговые комиссии и бонусы до 30,000 USDT. Чтобы полностью воспользоваться предложением, выполните такие действия, как торговля, пополнение счета и завершение процесса KYC.

 

Начиная с 14/08/2024, активируйте реферальный код Bybit "62545" для получения 10% скидки на торговые комиссии и до 30,000 USDT в качестве бонусов при регистрации. Для получения максимального бонуса, выполните задачи, такие как торговля криптовалютами, пополнение счета и завершение проверки KYC.

 

С 14/08/2024 используйте реферальный код Bybit "62545" для получения 10% скидки на все торговые комиссии и до 30,000 USDT в виде приветственных бонусов. Для получения полного набора бонусов, не забудьте завершить торговлю фьючерсами, пополнить счет и пройти процесс KYC.

entry.title: Folder Already Exists [66000 - 11]
entry.content:
Hi, currently i'm working on a Add-On for SAP Business One. But Whenever i open the SRF that i used in Visual Studio to open the form in SAP Business One, i encounter a problem. Where the SAP Said i already open the form, and then it detected the form is already exists. But in fact the form is not opened, can anyone help me to fix this ? i already tried to make another SRF but couldn't work either. It's a pleasure to be helped.

this is my code for MenuEvent_Handler

public void HandleMenuEvent(ref SAPbouiCOM.MenuEvent pVal, out bool BubbleEvent)
{
BubbleEvent = true;

try
{
if (pVal.MenuUID == "SOL_AUTO_JRNL")
{
MenuEvent_Handler(ref pVal, out BubbleEvent);
}

}
catch (Exception ex)
{
oSBOApplication.MessageBox(ex.Message);
}
finally
{
BubbleEvent = false;
}
}

 

 

public void MenuEvent_Handler(ref SAPbouiCOM.MenuEvent pVal, out bool BubbleEvent)
{
BubbleEvent = true;

try
{
SAPbouiCOM.Form oForm = oSBOApplication.Forms.Item("form_Utama");

if (pVal.BeforeAction == true)
{
XMLLoader oXMLLoader = new XMLLoader();
XmlDocument oXMLDoc = new XmlDocument();
SAPbouiCOM.Matrix oMtx;

DateTime current = DateTime.Today;

//Start Load Form Function
oXMLDoc.Load("MenuUtama.srf");
oSBOApplication.LoadBatchActions(oXMLDoc.InnerXml);
}
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
oSBOApplication.MessageBox(ex.Message);
}

}

entry.title: Re: Custom Authorization for Profit Center Hierarchy in Group Reporting
entry.content:
We are version 2020 of GR.

We have custom field in GR with hierarchy. While creating AFO query directly from standard delivered I_MATRIX query the performance is very tough.

Due to this reason we are directly trying to create a custom query /custom CDS view on the top of ACDOCU for all consolidation reports

Has any one tried this in version 2020. What are the pros and cons of custom query for all GR reports, when we are trying to upgrade shortly to 2023 version

Appreciate your inputs
​

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

Greetings!

My name is Anh and I am a SAP Consultant from Vietnam. SAP Consultant is my first job, I chose it for my internship and I found that it's really suitable for me and I immersed myself in it till now. There are a lots of things to learn, research and absorb everyday and that is my big motivation.

I am wishful to learn more and take examination as a way of self-studying and I hope that you will give me a chance to verify my learning with free certification attempts.

Thank you very much for considering my application.

Best regards,

Anh.

entry.title: Re: GLGCU1 (RGURECGLFLEX) does not update depreciation &...
entry.content: I found that the data that are not in BSEG table cannot be transferred to another specific ledger, so it doesn't directly matters to the document type but the underlined logic of this particular program RGURECGLFLEX.

entry.title: Find Technical Object : Display list issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Few days back I posted the thread to explore option of having Technical name and Description in seperate column - Please find that post link : https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/issue-with-find-technical-object-apps/

I still have questions around this apps.

As shown below, SAP has provided column for technical object (2 column with same name - Confusing ??)  Second column shows Superior tech Object's details without description in seperate column. ( This is what I am looking for technical object case)

Question here, if it is possible to have a seperate column for Description and tech object , why SAP has not given that facility for main technical object on which this apps runs ?

Is there any other report in Embedded analytics or apps, we can see technical object list as a report ? which covers these limitations ?

Or Is there any future release which is going to address this issue ?

BR,

R

entry.title: Re: T-CODE for mass upload of linking documents to Materi...
entry.content: I have not seen one -but you can try using an LSMW for this? or check with ABAPER if he can write custom program to use in a custom t-code.

entry.title: Replicate SAP ECC data to SAP BTP Hana cloud Hana database using CPI or SDI?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is it possible to replicate Large/Huge volume of data from SAP ECC legacy system to SAP Hana cloud, Hana DB using CPI or Smart data Integration SDI.

if so what are the pros & cons for using CPI & SDI for replicating large volume of data from ECC?

Which of these is a better recommended approach.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content: I can't wait to see the new tutorial and activities !!!! I love this contest !!

entry.title: Re: PR Release procedure with cost center
entry.content:
Hi,

CEBAN-KOSTL is CHAR field of length 10 and hence you need to pass leading zeros while you maintain characteristics. In your example, you need to pass the CC as 0010100001 in CL24N and test the scenario.

If its still not triggered and you are in S4 104 or 105, you may check the correction note # 3008735 - Release strategy not determined for PR when cost center is configured as characteristic 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: PR release strategies - Typical Scenarios
entry.content:
Hi,

Since you need the release strategy as a combination of material groups, I dont think you can achieve directly with standard. However, you may go for enhancement with a user field (CEBAN-USRC1) for example and trigger the release based on the user field. You need to pass the values via exit in the back end to the user field based on your own logic, which could be the 'group of materials groups'. Refer the note: 365604 - FAQ: Release strategies in purchasing , point 3 for the exits for release strategy.

You may consider a TMG ztable to maintain the material groups and the corresponding user field, to ensure the sustainability.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to transfer multiple material stk from batch to b...
entry.content:
Hi,

If the physical stock is not matching with system stock, I would suggest to go for a physical inventory process, so that you can correct all the materials in one go!

Regards,

entry.title: Реферальный код Bybit "BET666" — обновленная информация о бонусе
entry.content:
Криптовалютная биржаBybit
Реферальный код BybitBET666
Скидка на торговые комиссии50%
Приветственный бонусДо 30,000 USDT
Дата с 15.08.2024

 

Начиная с 15/08/2024, используйте код "BET666" при регистрации на Bybit, чтобы получить 50% скидку на все торговые комиссии и до $30,000 USDT в виде бонусов. Для получения полного бонуса выполните задания, такие как торговля фьючерсами, переводы криптовалют и завершение процедуры KYC.

 

 

 

 

 

С 15/08/2024 используйте реферальный код "BET666" на платформе Bybit, чтобы получить 50% скидку на торговые комиссии и до $30,000 USDT в приветственных бонусах. Для получения полного бонуса выполните торговлю фьючерсами, переводы криптовалют и завершите проверку KYC.

 

 

 

 

 

Начиная с 15/08/2024, примените реферальный код Bybit "BET666" для получения скидки 50% на все торговые комиссии и до $30,000 USDT в виде бонусов при регистрации. Полный бонус доступен при выполнении таких действий, как торговля фьючерсами, переводы криптовалют и завершение KYC.С 15/08/2024 введите реферальный код "BET666" на Bybit, чтобы получить 50% скидку на торговые комиссии и до $30,000 USDT в бонусах при регистрации. Чтобы получить полный бонус, выполняйте задачи, включая торговлю фьючерсами, переводы криптовалют и завершение процедуры KYC.

entry.title: Bybit Referans Kodu "BET666" - Güncellenmiş Bonus Bilgileri
entry.content:
Kripto Para BorsasıBybit
Bybit Referans Kodu"BET666"
Ticaret Ücreti İndirimiİlk ay için %50'ye kadar
Hoşgeldin Bonusu30.000 USDT'ye kadar
İndirim Oranı ve Bonus$100 USDT bonus ve 30.000 USDT'ye kadar

15/08/2024 itibarıyla, Bybit'te "BET666" referans kodunu kullanarak tüm işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim ve kayıt bonusu olarak 30.000 USDT'ye kadar ödül kazanabilirsiniz. Tam bonusu almak için vadeli işlemler yapmalı, kripto para transferi gerçekleştirmeli ve KYC doğrulamasını tamamlamalısınız.

 

 

 

 

 

15/08/2024'ten itibaren "BET666" referans kodunu Bybit'te kullanarak %50 işlem ücreti indirimi ve 30.000 USDT'ye kadar kayıt bonusu elde edebilirsiniz. Tam bonusu almak için vadeli işlemler yapmalı, kripto para transferi yapmalı ve KYC doğrulamasını tamamlamalısınız.

 

 

 

 

 

 

15/08/2024'ten itibaren, Bybit'te "BET666" kodunu kullanarak tüm işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim ve kayıt bonusu olarak 30.000 USDT'ye kadar ödül alabilirsiniz. Tam bonus için vadeli işlemler yapmanız, kripto para transferi gerçekleştirmeniz ve KYC doğrulamasını tamamlamanız gerekmektedir.

entry.title: Need career Guidance
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently I'm working in MNC as SAP FI end-user since 2 year and have completed SAP FI certification. I'm looking for Apportunity in SAP FI associate consultant

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Kavinprabu,

OK, I can see why you are not seeing your Enable Now content in SAP Companion.  Please make the following changes to the configuration in S/4HANA:

LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL set to https://yourcompanyname.enable-now.cloud.sap/
LEARNING_APP_WORKSPACE set to sapextended
EDITOR should be set to false in Production but true is fine in QA or DEV or wherever you are creating content

You should also add another parameter if it is not in the configuration;
VERSION set it to a version number on the standard content that is loaded into Manager, e.g. 2023.latest

You don't have to use the SAP Companion configuration screens in Manager, these are used to configure SAP Companion for applications such as Ariba where the SAP Companion configuration is performed in Manager, not in the application.  In the case of S/4HANA, you have done the configuration in S/4HANA.

However, there are some basic settings, not SAP Companion configuration, that must be setup correctly in Manager to allow Manager and SAP Companion to communicate and to allow end users to see the content in Manager.  To learn more about those settings, refer to the Troubleshooting SAP Companion Issues Community Post.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Bybit Empfehlungscode: BET666 – Neues Bybit-Bonus-Update
entry.content:
KryptowährungsbörseBybit
Bybit EmpfehlungscodeBET666
Handelsgebühren-Rabatt50% Rabatt auf alle Handelsgebühren
WillkommensbonusBis zu 30.000 USDT
Rabatt und Bonus50% Rabatt und bis zu 30.000 USDT Bonus

 

 

Ab dem 15.08.2024 können Sie den Bybit-Empfehlungscode „BET666“ auf Bybit verwenden, um 50 % Rabatt auf alle Handelsgebühren und bis zu 30.000 USDT als Anmeldebonus zu erhalten. Um den vollen Bonus zu erhalten, müssen Sie mit Futures handeln, Kryptowährungen übertragen und die KYC-Verifizierung abschließen.

Um den vollen Bonus zu erhalten, müssen Sie Futures-Transaktionen durchführen, Kryptowährungen übertragen und die KYC-Verifizierung abschließen.

Um den vollen Bonus zu erhalten, müssen Sie Futures-Transaktionen durchführen, Kryptowährungen übertragen und den KYC-Prozess abschließen.

entry.title: Re: 如何使用备选统驭(对账)科目
entry.content:
您可以自己测试一下 Fiori 应用：Create Incoming Invoices(FB60)。备选统御科目是可以更改的。

但是【建立供应商发票】 & 【建立供应商发票-高级】 更改不了。S/4HANA Cloud也没有配置能够控制，也没有增强的地方能修改。

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bybit : BET666 - Nouvelle mise à jour du bonus Bybit
entry.content:
Échange de cryptomonnaieBybit
Code de parrainage Bybit"BET666"
Réduction sur les frais de transactionJusqu'à 50% pour le premier mois
Bonus de bienvenueJusqu'à 30,000 USDT
Taux de réduction et bonusBonus de 100 USDT et jusqu'à 30,000 USDT

 

À partir du 15/08/2024, vous pouvez utiliser le code de parrainage Bybit « BET666 » sur Bybit pour obtenir 50 % de réduction sur tous les frais de trading et jusqu'à 30 000 USDT en guise de bonus d'inscription. Pour obtenir le bonus complet, vous devez négocier des contrats à terme, transférer des crypto-monnaies et effectuer la vérification KYC.

 

 

 

 

 

À partir du 15/08/2024, vous pouvez utiliser le code de parrainage « BET666 » sur Bybit pour obtenir 50 % de réduction sur tous les frais de trading et jusqu'à 30 000 USDT en guise de bonus d'inscription. Pour obtenir le bonus complet, vous devez négocier des contrats à terme, transférer des crypto-monnaies et effectuer la vérification KYC.

 

 

 

 

 

 

À partir du 15/08/2024, vous pouvez utiliser le code de parrainage Bybit « BET666 » sur Bybit pour obtenir 50 % de réduction sur les frais de transaction et un bonus d'inscription pouvant atteindre 30 000 USDT. Pour obtenir le bonus complet, vous devez effectuer des transactions à terme, transférer des crypto-monnaies et terminer le processus KYC.

entry.title: Is Search String for Electronic Bank Statement still not available for SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content: Bank Reprocessing Rules is not able to cater our requirement, which is to add leading zeroes to Reference field. The bank sends them without leading zeroes, while our Reference field contains additional 2 leading zeroes.

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇱 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Code (Santiago, Chile)

entry.title: Re: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Field...
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly run the following queries and if any result, contact your partner or if you are a partner, then open a support ticket to SAP Support using the Support Launchpad:

Select * from ITM1 Where "Factor" = 0;

SELECT * FROM ITM1 WHERE "Price" < 0;

kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: GL balances migration strategy from legacy
entry.content: Hello Sanil, could you please provide the link where it has been explained.

entry.title: Re: Adjust new Allowance Plan to Existing Allowances/ Pro...
entry.content:
Hi Xhoi, 

There is no standard way to do this. To replace allowance with old allowance plan in existing contracts with allowance having new allowance plan, you will have to write explicit migration logic in charge. If the parameters in new allowance plan are already available in contract you can use a recurring event to do this, else use usage rate to pass on new parameters to create new allowance and expire existing one.

Regards,

Ravindra

entry.title: Re: Concern About Processing Data with Common iFlow Trigg...
entry.content: are you saying there can be a race condition using process direct iflows?

entry.title: Re: Access Policies: Restrict Access to Integration Artifacts in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

I just want to restrict the accessing the payload of certain interface. 

But unauthorized user should be able to edit that iflow.os it possible with access policies

entry.title: Sales tax to be applied as per ship to country
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have scenario, Sales order is created in US Sold to Party and ship to Party is in other country. Ex. Canada

In this scenario business explains that tax should be applicable as per Ship to country not as per the US sold to party/Supply plant and country. 

I tried to run test case keeping Ship to customer as Canada, but system picks tax from US, as tax determination will be triggered for US as supply plant and supply region combination.

Has anyone come across such scenario then please let me know how this can be setup. Or is it regular scenario for Tax to be picked as per ship to country. 

I have checked RITA is not available in US and CANADA.

Looking forward for valuable inputs.

PS: I am new to US tax scenarios.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance 

Anand

entry.title: Re: Access Policies: Restrict Access to Integration Artifacts in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello Vibha, 
Hope you are doing great. 

FYI, we cannot restrict the accessing the payload of certain interface. But you can do one thing, by updating the custom role collection in the BTP cockpit. This will work as per your requirement.

Coming to the unauthorized user, you can limit the access with the custom role collection.

Refer Below : SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integr... - SAP Community

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Need to include "Place of supply" IN_GSTPLACEOFSUPPLY...
entry.content:
Hi,

This BADI does not support setting the "Place of supply" field as a mandatory field.

Thanks and Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Copy control from SO to PR/PO
entry.content:
User creates SO and generate PR by MRP. Also, they require to transfer some SO information eg. end customer remarks/ carton label remarks/ shipmark remarks to PO for vendor to followup.

However, the current copying rules seems cannot find relevant controls to copy data from SO to PR/PO. Any workaround/ approach can achieve this purpose?

entry.title: Re: XSUAA "single sign out"
entry.content: Hi mate, could you share information about SSO in CAP?

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: How are Key Risk Indicators Useful in the Risk Management Process?
entry.content:
There seems to be an increased interest recently for Key Risk Indicators – or KRIs. At least, I am seeing more and more questions on this topic from colleagues, partners and customers from various regions.

The questions I get most frequently are:

  • How are key risk indicators useful to the risk management process?
  • What makes a good key risk indicator?
  • What is a simple, real-life example, that I can use to bring this concept to life for non-risk experts?

As a result, I thought I’d put together this blog as it may answer your questions as well.

First things first, let’s start with a definition. In my opinion, the best one comes from research commissioned by COSO and carried out by the ERM Initiative at North Carolina State University:

“Key risk indicators are metrics used by organizations to provide an early signal of increasing risk exposures in various areas of the enterprise. In some instances, they may represent key ratios that management throughout the organization track as indicators of evolving risks, and potential opportunities, which signal the need for actions that need to be taken.”
Developing Key Risk Indicators to Strengthen Enterprise Risk Management

 

How are key risk indicators useful to the risk management process?

 

When discussing use cases with customers and prospects, the most often cited ones can be broken down into 3 categories:

  1. Early warning system: This is exactly what was meant in the definition with a metric signalling that an action is required. KRIs need to alert the Risk Owner that a negative trend is occurring and that the likelihood of a risk manifesting is increasing so that mitigation actions can be implemented.
  2. Support for risk identification and assessment: Here, there are 2 scenarios. First of all, Risk Owners sometimes don’t know all the incidents or near misses associated to their risks. Especially if they occurred in a different location. As a result, they may have assessed the likelihood of a risk as “Low” without knowing that there were numerous near misses on the same period. Getting a KRI showing the number of incidents and near misses can help them review their assessment. Similarly, Risk Owners – especially if they have just been put in charge of a new risk, might not have a deep understanding of all the root-causes. Since a KRI can only be fully effective if it monitors a “trigger”, working on defining a KRI can therefore lead to better root-cause analysis for the event itself.
  3. Predictive for emerging risks: This is where KRI will bring even more value. When it can help predict the outcome of a risk. Contrarily to Key Performance Indicators that focus more on the historical (past) performance, a KRI looks at current trends and future evolutions of the risk context. And therefore helps Risk Experts reassess the risk situation if necessary.

 

What makes a good key risk indicator?

 

I had started a list in an old blog I posted on this topic a few years ago. But I think it’s time to review, and update.

  • KRIs need to be simple to be understood by every stakeholder – there should be no need to be an expert to understand the resulting value as actions might be required based on it
  • To truly support the decision making process, one must ensure that KRIs are quantifiable so that they can be used in threshold monitoring and trigger appropriate escalations
  • KRIs should be tied back to drivers so that they can help understand what trigger is becoming of concern and needs to be addressed rapidly
  • Since some KRIs might be relevant for multiple risks, it should be possible to assign them to various risk events without needing to duplicate them
  • Which now leads me directly to my last recommendation: there’s no need to create more KRIs than necessary. Too many alerts create a constant “noise” and too many false positives will dilute the true notification and weaken the overall monitoring process.

Concerning types of KRIs, I think there are 3 categories:

  • Manual KRIs: for when the data doesn’t exist in a source system so needs to be collected by an expert
  • Automated KRIs: these work well when the data is available in a system – an ERP for instance, a feed from a data provider or even the risk management system itself
  • Nested/Combined KRIs: for when you need to combine multiple KRIs (including manual and automated) to get a meaningful data point. For instance, a Unit Risk Manager might want to be notified in case the number of near misses associated to a “High” risk  has increased by more than X% on the period but the likelihood of the risk hasn’t been updated since Y days

 

What is a simple, real-life example, that I can use to bring this concept to life for non-risk experts?

 

Ever heard of the acronym “ELI5”? If stands for “Explain Like I'm 5”. I am sure you can now relate…

Since GRC is often compared to a car, I usually pick the same example to explain KRIs.

 

 

(Key Risk) Indicator

Associated risk

Speed limit warning on GPS

Fine - You are exceeding the speed limit and might get a fine

Frost warning

Accident - The outside temperature is close to freezing so the road might be icy and you may lose manoeuvrability

Roadworthiness testing date

Accident - You are overdue for roadworthiness testing and therefore might be more liable or even uninsured in case of an accident

Tyre pressure alert

Accident - You have a flat or burst tyre so could lose control of the vehicle when breaking or steering

Fuel level and remaining distance

Breakdown - You won’t reach your destination as you’ll will run out of fuel before then

 

Together, these indicators – all automated – help you drive more safely.

The same is true for your business: good indicators will help improve performance by avoiding pitfalls and highlighting opportunities.

I hope this has helped vulgarize key risk indicators. I look forward to reading your thoughts and comments either on this blog or on Twitter @TFrenehard

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am from New Delhi, India. Just in the learning stage of SAP.

entry.title: Re: CAP Java: 404 error when Mocking Remote Service as OData Service
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake,

I mocked Remote Service as OData Service and it is working properly.
But, after deploying it, i am not able to call the remote service.

application.yaml, i am using application defined Application Defined Destinations in Java

spring:
  config.activate.on-profile: cloud
  # sql.init.schema-locations: classpath:schema-nomocks.sql
cds:
  remote.services:
    CatalogService:
      type: "odata-v4"
      destination:
        properties:
          url: https://81fff548trial-dev-cap-target-service.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com
          suffix: "/odata/v4"
          authentication: TokenForwarding

Response i am getting on the browser,

{
"error": {
"code": "50012005",
"message": "The remote OData service responded with status code '200'"
}
}

these are the logs, i fetched from Application Logging Service,

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.774
cap-remote-service-srv
1fc91461-f5b5-49ae-6525-7e36959627a4
DEBUG
com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl
Finished emit of 'ApplicationLifecycleService$Default' for event 'ERROR_RESPONSE', entity ''

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.769
cap-remote-service-srv
1fc91461-f5b5-49ae-6525-7e36959627a4
DEBUG
com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl
Executing ON handler 'public void com.sap.cds.services.impl.application.ErrorResponseHandler.onErrorResponse(com.sap.cds.services.application.ErrorResponseEventContext)' (order 11000) for event 'ERROR_RESPONSE' on service 'ApplicationLifecycleService$Default' and entity ''

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.769
cap-remote-service-srv
1fc91461-f5b5-49ae-6525-7e36959627a4
DEBUG
com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl
Started emit of 'ApplicationLifecycleService$Default' for event 'ERROR_RESPONSE', entity ''

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.744
cap-remote-service-srv
1fc91461-f5b5-49ae-6525-7e36959627a4
ERROR
com.sap.cds.adapter.odata.v4.processors.CdsProcessor
The remote OData service responded with status code '200' (service 'CatalogService', event 'READ', entity 'CatalogService.Books')

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.744
cap-remote-service-srv
1fc91461-f5b5-49ae-6525-7e36959627a4
INFO
com.sap.cds.adapter.odata.v4.processors.CdsProcessor
Exception marked the ChangeSet 3 as cancelled: The remote OData service responded with status code '200' (service 'CatalogService', event 'READ', entity 'CatalogService.Books')

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.742
cap-remote-service-srv
1fc91461-f5b5-49ae-6525-7e36959627a4
DEBUG



com.sap.cds.services.impl.odata.RemoteODataClient
Received OData response with status code '200' and error message '<html><head><link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" /><script>document.cookie="fragmentAfterLogin="+encodeURIComponent(location.hash)+";path=/;";document.cookie="locationAfterLogin="+encodeURIComponent(location.href.split('#')[0].split(location.host)[1])+";path=/;";document.cookie="signature=IsXmcTjzO5SxaN3mzg04rlKJ%2BDI%3D;path=/;";location="https://81fff548trial.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-cap-target-service-81fff548trial-dev!t294135&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2F81fff548trial-dev-cap-target-service.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com%2Flogin%2Fcallback"</script></head></html>'

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.738

WARN

Aug 13, 2024 @ 05:18:52.725

Thanks,

entry.title: Document TAB Production Order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to details understanding on Production Order Option from 

SAP Business One Main Menu, -> choose Administration ->  System Initialization -> Document Settings Per Document tab, and in the Document field, select Production Order.

In the Use for components transactions: Component WIP Accounts and Parent Item WIP Accounts. 

In the Posting Schemas for Manufacturing area, select the Accounting with Balance Sheet Accounts and Profit & Loss Accounts radio button.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: How can I clear the WIP balance in TECO production order?
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: How can I clear the WIP balance in TECO production or...
entry.content:
Hi Huny,

Please check whether there is error in app:

Manage Event-Based Posting Errors - Product Costing

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: 供應商發票Create API 是否能輸入調節科目?
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: see P users in my SAP for ME
entry.content: Dear Iva, Kindly know we SAP Product Support can only help and unlink P-user from UID account. For all the other P-user related inquiries and issues, could you pls kindly send e-mail to the SAP IDS team directly at sso@sap.com? Thanks for your kind cooperation and understanding here. Regards, SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Translation of Object Type
entry.content:
Greetings,

you can maintain translations by logging into the system in your desired language while you do your customizing or you can maintain translation by following the path GOTO -> Translations.

SPRO -> Plant Maintenance and Customer Service -> Master Data in Plant Maintenance and Customer Service -> Technical Objects -> General Data -> Define Types of Technical Objects

Select your desired language and maintain the translation.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Find Technical Object : Display list issue
entry.content:
Hi Riyaj,

I can't comment on the design of the original app, and the naming convention that was used. But, I agree that the column names that are currently in there are not consistent and could be confusing to end users. That second 'Technical Object' column is the parent without a description. And there are no separate FLOC or EQ columns to even break this out.

If you compare this to other apps such as "Manage Maintenance Notifications and Orders" you will see more consistent filters and columns (technical object, equipment, functional location, description etc). This will not fit your use case as it's taking Notifications and Orders as the leading object so it will not include all technical objects, but I raise it as an example of how a standard set of filters could be standardised.

Other than building your own custom report with a CDS view, I would recommend logging this idea on the customer influence portal for the development roadmap: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1172

(If you search for 'find technical object' in the portal, you will see other proposed additions to the same app, but not for this specific use case). 

Tim

entry.title: Re: Changelog deletion with Process chain does not work
entry.content: Hi Roland,

entry.title: Is it impossible to connect by client when connecting SAP in SAP Registered Server Program?
entry.content:
hello everyone, I'm asking you because I'm curious conceptually.

 

Is it impossible to connect by clients when connecting SAP in SAP Registered Server Program?

I want to split SAP into clients and use it.

At this time, I would like to connect the service to each client that is separated.

For example, service A wants to connect to client number 100 only
It was also connected to client 200.

I'm asking if it's a fundamental way to do it because I can't find anything related in the reference document.

 

ex)

 

jco_31_documentation.pdf 

For example, is there no option like jco.server.clientno?

Thank you, and have a nice day.

entry.title: SAP B1 HANA - attachment folder is frequently not mounted
entry.content:
Using SAP Business One HANA 9.3 PL04.

The attachment path is located in the shared folder \\xx.xxx.xxx.xx\b1_shf\Attachment.

We have mounted the attachment folder to the path mentioned so that when we send an AR invoice with an attachment from SAP to the customer, the customer will receive the AR invoice PDF copy.

However, it happens frequently that the attachment folder will not be mounted suddenly. We have to re-mount the attachment path. 

I'm not sure why. Any clue? 

FYI, we mount the attachment path using 'root' ID, and the 'root' ID password contains special characters like '!@#' Could this be the cause?

entry.title: Re: Changelog deletion with Process chain does not work
entry.content: Hi Roland, the settings of the variant are "Remove Old Requests From Change Log" and older 30 Days. The aDSO is of type "Data Warehouse Layer - Delta Calculation", so Change Log is on and loaded requests have to be activated. For the given Time Interval are more then several hundred requests to be deleted. Does this help? let me know if you need any furter details

entry.title: Change Phantom Bom Alt
entry.content:
Hi There

i have one material ( x ) with 2 bom version , in the both version i have 2 phantom item and both phantoms have 2 bom version .

we create production order from x material with bom version 2 , how can i select phantoms component ( x subcategory ) bom version 2 ?

Is there a relation between the main product bom version and the phantom assembly bom version?

entry.title: Re: 供應商發票Create API 是否能輸入調節科目?
entry.content: Sorry, it seems to be a Procure question. I have added Procure tag.

entry.title: SAP CRM Business Partner Change History - Clean Up Report?
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a long running SAP CRM 7.0 EHP 3. Some BPs have hundereds of changes. Ist there a way to clean up the chnage document tables with an report?

Best regards Richard

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

As described , we have enabled on-premise systems (1709 FSP02)  to check our code using a remote ATC check variant of the central ATC check system in the cloud. ( SAP BTP ABAP Runtime).

But in the final stage, we are gettng the error when trying in Onprmise ->T-code ->SCI -> Menu -> Code Inspector->Management of -> Reference check system -> RFC Destination : "CLOUD_CONNECTOR".

Error message  : "No RFC authorization for function module FUNCTION_EXISTS."

I am not sure how to provide S_RFC authorization to the communication as there is no role assignment provision for communication user in SAP BTP ABAP runtime. ( May be I'm wrong).

OSS INC : 735394/2024 raised but not sure it reached to the right team.

Thanks,

Roy

entry.title: Use cases of SAP BTP Automation Pilot
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to "SAP BTP Automation Pilot" , kindly help on what it provides and how it can be used and what is the uses cases of "SAP BTP Automation Pilot". Please help on this. thank you so much in advance.

Thanks & Regards,

Prasad

entry.title: Re: Planning strategy 30
entry.content:
Hi Sir,

What about Plant stock during planning stratergy 30?

entry.title: Blog Series: S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition – 04 TM Freight Cost and SD Customer Billing
entry.content:
Software as a Service (SaaS) or public cloud option of SAP, has high standardization and less flexibility to configure/modify. SAP adds more features in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition regularly. As of now, every year there are 2 major releases in February and August. Smaller fixes are released between these major releases and systems are upgraded automatically during these release cycles. Hence, it is important to keep track of the available functionalities in each release. Moreover, some of the features are first released in the public cloud version before it is released in the on-premise or private edition. This blog focuses on the functionality to use SAP TM (Transportation Management) Freight Order charges in SAP SD (Sales and Distribution) Billing Document, which was first released in S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition (2019). This feature is now available in the private edition too.

Business Requirement:

One of the common business requirements for an end-to-end integrated order to cash and logistics process is the ability to invoice the customer the freight cost incurred for delivering the product. Some of the common scenarios are:

  1. Mark-Up: Charge an amount in Billing Document (as separate item) which is more than the estimate from the TM. One reason is to generate additional profit and freight revenue which will add to the overall profitability of the sale. Another reason is to incorporate the normalized amount of variance in freight costs (with respect to actual carrier invoices received from carrier) so that further credit/debit memo can be avoided.
  2. As-is: Charge the initial estimate from TM as is in the billing document. If there is a variance in freight cost (compared to carrier invoice), then the customer is charged a subsequent invoice or debit/credit memo. Some customers may write-off/ignore the variance or embed the normalized/estimated variance in the overall selling price of the product. 
  3. Slabs: If we use the price from TM as is or with a percentage mark up, then there is chance that the freight charge amount in the billing document can be different for the same ship-to party from the same source location. This can be because of the variability of weekly fuel surcharge, other accessorial charges etc. To resolve this issue, certain customers employ slab rates where the freight charge within a specific range will be a fixed amount.   
  4. Do not use TM cost: Here the freight charge used in the billing document is not based on freight estimate from TM system. Instead, quarterly or annual freight cost incurred is analyzed and the pricing is finalized. In this case the customer gets a fixed cost for specific scenarios and the variance with respect to actual cost is incurred by the selling company. This technique is losing popularity as the relatively accurate cost is available from TMS system nowadays.
  5. Do not charge freight as a separate amount: In this scenario, freight is not charged as a sperate item in the billing document. However, the freight cost may be incorporated/embedded in the selling price. The break-up of freight is masked, and the customer may not have the visibility of freight component of the overall price and selling prices can vary based on the customer’s location. However, the Freight-Out accounting will be critical as the margin or Cost & Profitability Analysis (COPA) is the key input for pricing.

In short, the freight cost to deliver the product to customer is an important component for SD (Sales and Distribution) pricing.  This will be critical when the freight cost is significant compared to product cost. Additionally, if the customer invoice is based on the TM freight estimate (either as is or marked up) then there will be the key and essential requirement of distributed freight cost. When multiple orders for different customers are transported together, distributed freight cost (for example based on ratio of weight of the products) is required to invoice the customers. Moreover, businesses would like to have different logic/rules to charge the freight cost (based on TM estimate) for different customers.

SAP Solution:

SAP Sales and Distribution uses condition technique to accurately calculate the prices in Billing Document. Same technique is used to calculate price for sales orders, purchase orders and other similar documents in SAP S/4 HANA.  Over the years, using this feature, SAP could cater to most of the business requirements in the pricing area across industries.

The condition technique is an infrastructure that helps to define master data and configure its determination. The master data are called condition records and are maintained in condition tables. To configure the determination, it uses the pricing procedure, condition type, and access sequence. In pricing, master data can be prices, discounts for materials and business partners, surcharges, sales taxes, and planned costs for customs or freight. The system uses this data to calculate the net value in a business document.

The pricing procedure defines the calculation sequence for the net value by specifying the order of condition types and subtotals. In addition, it defines which values are posted to accounting (Statistical Check Box). Subtotals are intermediate results of the price calculation, like the sum of discounts or sales tax values.

A condition type is a representation of a price, a discount, surcharge etc. Condition types control the process from the definition of master data to the net value calculation in a business document. For most condition types, different condition records can be defined for a combination of different price-relevant attributes and their values.

To control the search sequence per condition type, an access sequence can be defined and assigned to a condition type. Additionally, the access sequence defines when the system must stop searching.

For typical pricing activities, the standard SAP system provides predefined pricing procedures (sales), condition types, and access sequences. For example, the delivery includes condition types for material prices, discounts for materials, customers, or suppliers, and surcharges for freight and sales taxes. In the case of each element, one can use the standard version, modify the standard version, or create entirely new definitions to suit the business needs.

Reference: SAP Help

The above example details the use of condition technique to calculate the handling fee in billing document. Based on the parameters in Billing Document and Pricing procedure determination configuration, Z17J01 pricing procedure is selected. HF01, which represents handling fee, is a condition type assigned to the Pricing Procedure. HF01 has the access sequence AS01, which has 3 accesses and condition tables respectively. Since the system didn’t find any condition records (which match the billing data) for the first access (No 10/ table 901), condition records in for condition table 902 is checked and 10 USD is determined. This value is later used in the Billing Document for pricing. Similar process is executed for all condition types in pricing procedure and the total amount is calculated.

Once the Freight Units (based on Sales Order/Delivery) are planned in TM to create Freight Order, charges are calculated based on the carrier assigned. The standard TM module distributes the cost to underlying order items based on the rule (for example gross weight) set in the configuration. During billing document creation, the distributed cost can be pulled from the TM FO into the Billing document pricing conditions using the standard set-up. 

Details for this set up are available in document ‘Setting Up Manual Transportation Planning’ (6W2 - version 2024-06-26) Section 6.1 to 6.6. In short, the condition type config should have FCTM as the Condition Function. Additionally, we need to update the price source in copy control settings between delivery and billing document for item category as I - Order/Freight Order. Accordingly, distributed freight costs from TM will be available in Billing document against the condition type at the item level.

If we want to mark up and charge a higher percentage to the customer, standard pricing features of SD area can be utilized. For example, we can use a statistical or inactive condition type to pull and store the distributed freight cost while creating the billing document. Then we can have another condition type with a markup percentage which references the statistical condition type. Also, it is common to mask the percentage markup and print only the total freight cost in the invoice document we send to the customer.

Demo:

In order model the scenario to charge the certain customers 5 or 10% markup of the distributed freight cost calculated in TM FO, some of the key configuration set up (via Central Business Configuration) used are detailed below:

Pricing procure Z17J01 is configured to have ZBHD condition type (along with other condition types) with statistical check. ZFRM condition type (active) is also included in the pricing procedure and is a reference to item 10 (ZBHD statistical condition type) to calculate the markup percentage and amount.

Pricing procure Z17J01

ZBHD condition type is configured to pull the distributed freight cost from TM.

ZBHD condition type

 Additionally copy control settings are updated for the relevant item category as I – Order/Freight Order.

ZFRM condition type (active) is configured to calculate the markup with reference to inactive ZBHD condition type and access sequence DGP2 is assigned.

ZFRM condition type (active)

 Access Sequence DGP2 has one access with condition table 020.

Condition Table 020 has Sales Org, Distribution Channel, Division and Price Group as the fields.

For ZFRM condition type, condition records with condition amount/ratio 105% (5% markup) is maintained for C1 Price Group and 110% for C2  Price Group.

Condition Records

Please note that in the demo only the few pricing condition types are included to focus on the TM freight cost. Secondly input parameters to determine condition records are limited to Price Group only. This can be extended, and all features of SD pricing are available to cater to the business requirements.

Demo Process/Document Flow

Sales order 110 is created in Sales Area 1710/10/00 for US Customer 2 (1700002) with Shipping Condition 06 (TM – Int Planning) and Customer Price Group as C1 – Regular Buyer.  200 PC or 3600 KG TG11 material is order from Plant 1710.

SO 110

Similarly, Sales order 111 is also created for 300 PC / 5400 KG. Automatically created FU 4200000910 & 4200000911 against SO 110 & 111 are planned in Transportation Cockpit to create FO 6600000813. Carrier is updated and freight charges of 1000 USD are calculated in TM based on freight contracts/agreements maintained in TM.

Freight Order 6600000813

Deliveries 80000070 & 80000071 are created from TM and the documents are updated in TM document flow.

FO Document Flow

Pick, Pack and Post Goods Issue process of the outbound deliveries are completed, and the document is ready for billing. Additionally Distributed freight cost (based on ratio of gross weight) 400 USD & 600 USD are also available in the Freight Order. 

FO Cost Distribution

Using Create Billing Document App, the billing document 90000037 for Sales Order (110)/ Delivery (80000070) is generated and saved.

Billing Document 90000037

Freight cost (400 USD) at item level is retrieved from TM and is updated in item/header condition ZBHD of the billing document as an inactive/statistical charge. ZFRM condition referenced the ZBHD condition type, determined 105% markup from the condition records (as the condition records for customer group C1 is 105%) and updated the total amount as 420 USD. The total amount in the billing document includes the Price (PPR0), Freight Customer (ZFRM) and Tax (JR1). As designed, it did not include the inactive charges (Internal Price (PCIP) & TM Freight Cost/Est (ZBHD)). In this way we could charge a 5% markup of the distributed TM freight cost to the customer (with Price Group C1). This is just one way to model the prices. Using the SD pricing feature these can be designed differently and efficiently as per the business requirement.

Please note that there are some limitations to using TM distributed freight cost in SD billing. The feature can be used (as of now) when there is only one freight order document for the delivery and the freight order has the same currency in which you calculate the cost. For example, multistage delivery with multiple freight orders or bookings assigned are not supported. Freight Cost accounting (Freight-Out) and Cost & Profitability/Margin Analysis aspects are also not discussed in this blog as this blog focuses only on the freight revenue and use of TM freight cost in SD billing document. These areas can be topics for future blogs.

Business benefits:

  • Using distributed Freight Cost from TM in SD pricing conditions can significantly improve the accuracy of the pricing.
  • Customer satisfaction from robustness in pricing and integrated SD-TM solution.
  • Improved analytics helps in deciding collect vs prepaid contracts with customer.
  • No need to push for collect scenarios with customer because of the inability of TMS to provide reasonably accurate freight cost.
  • Ability to generate reasonable freight revenue as per the business requirement.
  • Options to avoid freight allowance (Reference) charged by customers by using prepaid scenarios 

Conclusion:

SAP adds more features in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition regularly. Some of the functionalities are first released in the public cloud version before it is released in the on-premise or private edition. Hence, it is important to keep track of the available features in each release.

Ability to use distributed TM freight cost in SD billing document is critical business requirement and an integrated solution is the key to cater to such requirements. In S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition, in addition to pull the distributed freight cost from TM, all the features of SD pricing can be utilized to modify the total freight charged to the customer. This showcases robust and seamless integration of various modules in S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition. Additionally, this solidifies the business case for having an integrated solution where all the products are from the same product vendor (SAP). Hence potential SAP customers must evaluate whether S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition with its current functionality and future roadmap is suitable for their business process, before they decide to explore other products/vendors.

entry.title: Re: 供應商發票Create API 是否能輸入調節科目?
entry.content:
Hi, currently it is not supported to enter reconciliation G/L account in Supplier Invoice APIs.

If you believe this functionality is essential for business processes and useful to other companies as well, you can send a feature request in Customer Influnence. Please refer to KBA 2963059 - New Feature Request in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
